opportunities.title: HR Associate
opportunities.description:
The HR Associate is responsible for supporting recruitment activities and related processes within the HR office

Recruitment

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage timely posting of job ads through external media and company website.
  • Screen job applications and conduct entrance examinations.
  • Schedule job interviews and conduct reference checks on candidates.
  • Conduct HR orientations and facilitate office tours for new hires.
  • Prepare initial job offers, subject to Management approval.
